data.reasoningText:
Now I need to create a `Directory.Packages.props` file with Central Package Management enabled, using the highest version for any conflicts.

Let me identify all packages and their versions:

- `System.Text.Json`: 10.0.1 (Api, Shared, Tests), 8.0.4 (Worker) → highest: 10.0.1
- `Azure.Identity`: 1.13.2 (Api), 1.11.4 (Shared) → highest: 1.13.2
- `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting`: 8.0.1 (Worker)


- `OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting`: 1.15.0 (Worker)
- `xunit`: 2.9.3 (Tests)

I'll create the `Directory.Packages.props` file at the solution root with `ManagePackageVersionsCentrally` enabled, then remove all `Version` attributes from the individual project files.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
